Now Hiring – Tadepalligudem

Medical Representative Jobs in Tadepalligudem, West Godavari

Crasenim Pharma is hiring Medical Representatives in Tadepalligudem, a growing corridor town in West Godavari district. This is an opportunity to build a loyal doctor base from the ground up in a developing territory with lower competition than established pharma markets. Both full-time and commission-based roles are available now.

📍 Tadepalligudem, West Godavari 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 Freshers & Experienced Welcome
💬 Apply via WhatsApp All Openings
Territory

Tadepalligudem Pharma Market Overview

Tadepalligudem is a growing town situated on the NH-16 corridor in West Godavari district, positioned between Eluru and Rajahmundry. Its expanding clinic and pharmacy infrastructure reflects steady population and economic growth in this belt. Unlike more saturated district headquarters, Tadepalligudem offers a genuine ground-floor opportunity for MRs who want to establish long-term relationships with doctors before competition intensifies.

For an MR willing to invest in building a territory, Tadepalligudem is ideal — the clinic density is rising, established brands have limited penetration in some specialties, and a consistent presence quickly earns doctor loyalty. Sub-territory coverage includes Kovvur and nearby towns depending on assignment.

Key Markets – Tadepalligudem Territory

Tadepalligudem (HQ), Kovvur, Nidadavolu, Akividu, Chintalapudi

  • NH-16 corridor town between Eluru and Rajahmundry — well connected by road and rail
  • Developing clinic and pharmacy infrastructure with growing patient footfall
  • Lower competition than established district headquarters — easier to make an impact
  • Ideal for MRs who want to build a loyal doctor base from the ground up
  • Commission-based role available with no investment required
  • Full product training and field support from Crasenim Pharma HQ in Vizianagaram
Job Openings

Pharma Vacancies in Tadepalligudem

Medical Representative – Tadepalligudem, West Godavari
📍 Tadepalligudem, West Godavari💼 Full-Time🕒 0–3 Years
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma products to GPs, clinics, and pharmacies across Tadepalligudem
  • Cover Tadepalligudem town and assigned sub-territory (Kovvur, Nidadavolu, or Akividu)
  • Competitive salary + travel allowance + monthly performance incentives
  • Structured onboarding, product training, and detailing material support from day one
Commission-Based MR – Tadepalligudem / Kovvur
📍 Tadepalligudem / Kovvur💼 Commission🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn monthly commission on prescriptions generated in the Tadepalligudem corridor
  • Flexible territory — cover Tadepalligudem, Kovvur, Nidadavolu, or Akividu based on your network
  • No investment required — immediate start for candidates with local doctor contacts
  • Bonus incentives for consistent growth in new clinic penetration and repeat prescriptions
FAQs

Pharma MR Jobs in Tadepalligudem – FAQ

Are pharma MR jobs available in Tadepalligudem right now?
Yes. Crasenim Pharma has openings for both full-time Medical Representatives and commission-based MRs in Tadepalligudem. This is a developing territory, so we are looking for self-motivated candidates who are ready to build it from the ground up.
Do I need prior pharma experience to apply in Tadepalligudem?
Experience is preferred but not mandatory for commission-based roles in Tadepalligudem. Freshers with a science background and good communication skills, or candidates with local doctor and pharmacy contacts, are welcome to apply. Full product training is provided.
How do I apply for an MR job in Tadepalligudem?
Send your details via WhatsApp to +91 99890 74806, email us at crasenimpharma@gmail.com, or use the application form on our Careers page. Mention Tadepalligudem as your preferred territory.
